findings.title: CI parity gate cannot run live-DB tests: postgres not provisioned in pr.yml lint-typecheck-unit job
findings.resolution: pr.yml lint-typecheck-unit job now has services: postgres:16 (health-checked, health-interval 5s, health-retries 10). DATABASE_URL and BRAIN_APP_DATABASE_URL both set in job env. Step 'Provision brain_app login role and apply migrations' (line 43-61) pre-creates brain_app as LOGIN NOSUPERUSER NOCREATEDB NOCREATEROLE NOBYPASSRLS — BYPASSRLS is explicitly NOT granted. pnpm migrate:up runs before test:parity step. YAML parses cleanly (python3 yaml.safe_load: OK). Live parity suite ran 16/16 GREEN in two back-to-back runs confirming ECONNREFUSED is eliminated.

findings.title: Test isolation brittle: sections D/E/F lack describe-level afterEach; inline cleanup not reached on test failure
findings.resolution: describe blocks D (Isolation, line 519), E (Per-currency, line 604), and F (Provisional, line 632) each now have a describe-level afterEach(() => clearLedgerRows(BRAND_PARITY_A, BRAND_PARITY_B)). Two back-to-back runs both returned 16/16 GREEN, confirming cleanup runs even across runs on a live DB. Suite is deterministic.

findings.title: Developer report claimed 16/16 GREEN without noting first-run failure (stale dev DB state)
findings.resolution: Not blocking. SEC-002 fix (describe-level afterEach) eliminates the stale-data condition. Two-run repeatability confirmed.

findings.title: BRAIN_APP_DATABASE_URL not in turbo.json globalPassThroughEnv
findings.resolution: turbo.json globalPassThroughEnv now contains both DATABASE_URL and BRAIN_APP_DATABASE_URL at line 4 (confirmed: python3 json parse check: both True). Turbo will pass the credential URL into the test:parity task environment.

delta_scope: SEC-001 HIGH + SEC-002 MED + SEC-004 LOW + QA-F2/ISO-2 strengthening; diff: .github/workflows/pr.yml (services block + brain_app provision step), turbo.json (globalPassThroughEnv), tools/parity-oracle/src/parity.test.ts (ISO-2 seeding + describe-level afterEach on D/E/F)
non_tautological_oracle: CONFIRMED — reference.ts has single import (pg PoolClient type only); zero calls to realized_gmv_as_of/provisional_gmv_as_of/metric-engine; uses recognition_label=finalized predicate vs engine event_type<>provisional_recognition; RED PROOF: 1-minor delta fails tolerance-0 gate
isolation_under_brain_app: CONFIRMED — ISO-1 asserts current_user=brain_app+is_superuser=false; ISO-2 seeds 100000n INR under Brand A, Brand B engine sees 0n INR (active RLS block, not absence-of-data), Brand B's own AED 30000n visible (non-degenerate); bidirectional symmetry confirmed
